blocker: Images were pushed and linked to the public source repository, but GHCR package visibility remains private. GitHub REST/GraphQL/gh API attempts to set package visibility returned 404; package visibility appears to require a GitHub Packages settings UI action or a token/API capability not available to this session.
manual_resolution: Open each package settings page in GitHub and change Package visibility to Public, then rerun unauthenticated crane manifest or docker pull by digest.
